title: trichocentrum pumilum
intro: Trichocentrum pumilum, also known as the 'Dwarf Yellow Orchid', is a species of orchid native to Central America, characterized by its small size and vibrant yellow flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Trichocentrum pumilum include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and boost the immune system. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and roots are often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
